title: CNR mechanical properties calculator module - molecular scale
description: (Computational module) - This module takes the equilibrated bulk polymer model as input and prepares it for mechanical testing by replicating the simulation cell and applying a series of molecular dynamics simulations. Controlled deformations are introduced under NPT conditions to obtain stress-strain responses for different loading modes. From these trajectories, the module computes key mechanical indicators of the polymer, including Young’s modulus, bulk modulus, and Poisson’s ratio, providing a quantitative assessment of the material’s macroscopic mechanical behavior directly from atomistic simulation.
creator: https://ror.org/04zaypm56
